# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 26, 2026, focused on advancing monetization infrastructure, with a new pull request initiated to integrate organizational credit balance debits and refine the application authentication consent flow.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Monetization and Auth Flow:** [#473](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/473) introduces functionality to debit organizational credit balances and rebuilds the application authentication consent flow.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None.*

## NEW ISSUES
*None.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None.*
